# USAgentLeads

> USAgentLeads is a verified real estate agent contact database covering all 50 US states. It provides 553,778+ agent contacts with name, email, phone, and state — available as instant CSV downloads or via REST API.

## Company Overview

USAgentLeads is a B2B data provider specializing in real estate agent contact information. The database is sourced from public state licensing boards, MLS directories, and brokerage websites, then verified for accuracy. The data is updated annually (last refreshed 2026). The company serves coaches, SaaS companies, mortgage lenders, marketing agencies, brokerages, and lead generation companies that need to reach licensed real estate professionals.

- Website: https://www.usagentleads.com
- Support: support@usagentleads.com
- Industry: B2B data / real estate technology
- Coverage: All 50 US states
- Total contacts: 553,778+
- Data fields: Full name, email address, phone number, state
- Data format: CSV (download) or JSON (API)
- Deliverability rate: 90%+

## Products & Pricing

### State Pack — $10/state
Download a single state's real estate agent contact list as a CSV file. Instant delivery, no account required. Available for all 50 states.

### Full Database — $99 one-time
All 50 states, 553K+ contacts in a single CSV download. One-time purchase, no subscription.

### Pro Dashboard — $49/month
Searchable web interface to browse, filter, and search all 553K+ agents by state, name, or email. No CSV download — designed for teams that need a live searchable interface.

### Pro API — $79/month
REST API access to query the full database programmatically. Supports state filtering, search, and paginated JSON responses. Includes 10,000 requests/month.

### Free Sample
A free 100-contact sample CSV is available on the homepage to evaluate data quality before purchasing.

## Glossary

Key terms defined: MLS, IDX, NAR, Realtor vs Real Estate Agent, Brokerage, Commission Split, CRM, Cold Email, CAN-SPAM, Real Estate Lead, Email List, CSV.

Browse all: https://www.usagentleads.com/glossary

## API Overview

The USAgentLeads REST API provides programmatic access to the full agent database.

- Base URL: https://www.usagentleads.com/api/v1
- Authentication: API key via X-API-Key header
- Endpoints: GET /agents (list/search/filter agents), GET /agents/:id (single agent)
- Filtering: by state (two-letter code), search by name/email
- Response format: JSON with pagination
- Rate limit: 10,000 requests/month (Pro API plan)
- Full docs: https://www.usagentleads.com/docs

## Data Quality

- Sourced from state licensing boards, MLS directories, and brokerage websites
- 90%+ email deliverability rate
- Updated annually (last refresh: 2026)
- Each record includes: full name, verified email, phone number, US state
- Free 100-contact sample available for quality evaluation
